body_txt: When Crossovers happen, part of the fun is getting to see characters from each respective universe slug it out , pitting their strengths, cunning, and powers against each other. But what happens when a character from one universe gains powers from another? Well, that's what you call a Crossover Power Acquisition. A Crossover Power Acquisition is when a character involved in a crossover gains a power that doesn't exist in the franchise they originate in but DOES exist in the franchise they crossover with. A Sub-Trope of Power Creep, Power Seep . Compare Crossover Combo Villain , wherein two villains from different franchises are combined into one. See also All Your Powers Combined .
